name: Doodle Drive
short_description: DoodleDrive is a 2D driving game where creativity meets physics. Draw paths, test your designs, and drive your car to the finish line across challenging levels.
detailed_description:
Doodle Drive – Where Creativity Meets Physics!

In Doodle Drive, every level is a canvas, and your imagination is the key to success! Use your creativity to draw roads, ramps, and shapes to guide your car through a series of challenging puzzles. Navigate tricky terrain, collect stars, and drive your way to victory in this fun, physics-based adventure.

Gameplay Overview:

Draw Mode: Use your ink to create roads, ramps, and shapes to guide your car.

Drive Mode: Test your creations by driving the car along your path and collecting stars.

Key Features:

  • Draw Your Own Path

Sketch custom roads and physics shapes to create the perfect route for your car to navigate each level.

  • 9 Unique Cars

Choose from 9 different cars, each with its own driving style and abilities. Pick the right one for each challenge!

  • 36 Handcrafted Levels

A variety of meticulously designed levels that will put your creativity and problem-solving skills to the test.

  • Dynamic Physics

Experience realistic physics as your car and doodles interact with the environment, making every run feel unique.

  • Endless Creativity

Solve puzzles in your own way – no two solutions are ever the same. The more inventive you are, the better your chances of success!

Draw smart. Drive fast. Expect a few flips along the way.
